description_long: This is a stylized, compact handgun with a predominantly orange upper frame and a gray lower section, featuring a blocky, angular design. The left side of the frame displays a yellow sticky note with handwritten text, while the right side features a large yellow smiley face sticker and three circular indents. The grip is robust and slightly textured, with a visible trigger guard and a rectangular trigger opening. The barrel is short and integrated into the upper frame, with a circular muzzle and minimal external detailing. The surface is matte with visible wear, scratches, and some cartoonish embellishments, giving it a rugged, urban appearance.
description: A compact, stylized orange and gray handgun with stickers, a blocky design, and visible wear. Features include a textured grip, short barrel, and cartoonish details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the circular muzzle, rectangular upper frame, and the transition from orange to gray at the barrel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the yellow sticky note with handwritten text, three circular indents, and the angular grip.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the grip and slide, with minimal detailing and a clear view of the color transition.
description_view_3: Right side view features a large yellow smiley face sticker, three circular indents, and the vented lower frame.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is robust and rectangular with a slightly contoured backstrap, featuring a matte gray finish and subtle stippling for improved hold. The surface appears to be made of polymer or rubberized material, providing a non-slip texture. There are no visible finger grooves, logos, or decorative embellishments, giving it a utilitarian look. The grip is integrated smoothly into the lower frame, with a slight flare at the base for better retention.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is thick and rectangular with rounded edges, providing ample space for finger placement. It lacks undercuts or aggressive texturing, maintaining a simple, functional appearance. The guard is integrated into the lower frame and does not feature any accessory rails or reinforcement, emphasizing a minimalist design.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and cylindrical, integrated into the upper orange frame with a circular muzzle opening. There are no visible threads, ports, or compensators, and the exterior is smooth with a matte finish. No markings or special features are present on the barrel surface.
attribute_slide_markings: The left side of the slide features a yellow sticky note with handwritten text, while the right side displays a large yellow smiley face sticker. There are no manufacturer logos, serial numbers, or caliber designations visible. The markings are decorative and non-standard, contributing to the stylized, urban aesthetic.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and slightly flared, matching the gray color of the grip. It is rectangular with no finger rest, logos, or texturing, and blends seamlessly with the grip's lower contour. The design is simple and functional, with no extended or beveled features.
